servinfo.title: Driver Air Bag (Inflator) Module Inspection

ptxt.intxrefpoff: Driver Air Bag (Inflator) Module Removal and Installation

item.ptxt: Never measure resistance of air bag (inflator) module. Current of tester can deploy air bag.
Never repair or disassemble air bag (inflator) module.

servinfo.ptxt: Check air bag (inflator) module and if any of the following conditions is found, replace air bag (inflator) module or steering wheel with new one.

item.ptxt: Air bag (inflator) module being deformed or damaged
Air bag (inflator) module bracket of steering wheel being deformed or damaged
Unable to install new air bag (inflator) module smoothly (Clearance between steering wheel and air bag (inflator) module is uneven)
